zh.Husborne Crawley, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯波內 可拉利
zh.lifeSummary: John Alain de Cochrane於1538年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯波內 可拉利。他於1549年1月17日與Marion Thomson在蘇格蘭斯林史爾法爾吉可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1589年在英國英格蘭米德萊可享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cochrane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cochran
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire): habitational name from the lands of Cochrane in the parish of Paisley, near Glasgow. The placename is of uncertain derivation, perhaps from Welsh coch ‘red’, although this etymology is not supported by the early spelling Coueran.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

en.lifeSummary: John Alain de Cochrane was born in 1538, in Husborne Crawley, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Marion Thomson on 17 January 1549, in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1589, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: John Alain de Cochrane est né en 1538, à Husborne Crawley, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Marion Thomson le 17 janvier 1549, à Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1589, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Alain de Cochraneは1538年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアハスボルン クラウリーで生まれた。1549年1月17日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアファルキルクでMarion Thomsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1589年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Alain de Cochrane(은)는 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 후스본 크롤리에서 태어났다. 그는 1549년 1월 17일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 파커크에서 Marion Thomson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1589년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.
